system.description: This demon does not have a basic attack and cannot make Attacks of Opportunity. Every character and demon in the same zone as it is considered within melee range of it.

The demon attacks a target within melee range, aiming to deal 10/W8 and hitting everyone nearby to the target. Only one attack roll needs to be made, but all targets must roll to defend. Those hit must succeed at a TN 6 Prowess saving throw or be swallowed whole. Those that are swallowed take a 7/W6 Wound. Inside the demon, they will take a 4/W4 Wound at the beginning of their respective turns as they are digested. They can cut their way out by dealing at least 8 points of damage in a single attack with a bladed weapon. The demon cannot defend against attacks made from within it, treating it as if it rolled 0 hits to defend.

The demon attacks every nearby target within the zone, aiming to deal 7/W6. Only one attack roll needs to be made but all targets must roll to defend. Any hit must succeed at a TN 7 Prowess saving throw or be knocked Prone.

The demon burrows underground, leaving an enormous opening in the snow and earth. Using the Move action underground requires a Minor action. The demon can use this action again to resurface. Every character nearby to where it surfaces within the zone must make a TN 6 Prowess saving throw or be knocked Prone.

While surfaced, the demon can move up to 2 zones per Move action. Any character or demon in the zone it enters must make a Prowess save or be knocked Prone. Characters in its path of travel must roll against TN 6. Failure will result in taking a 9/W9 Wound as the demon rolls over them.

The demon empties its stomach, throwing stomach acid and the bodies of anything recently eaten across the zone it occupies. All within the zone must make a TN 6 Prowess saving throw or be covered in acid. The acid inflicts a 4/W4 Wound immediately and at the beginning of their respective turns. They spend a Full action to clear the acid from themselves.
